page: Microsoft Azure EC16es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEV5 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture, this server features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. The server does not feature any onboard GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC16es_v5 offers a high density of memory relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for workloads that require substantial RAM without the need for a proportional increase in CPU cores. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive applications, including relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise applications requiring large memory footprints.
description: Microsoft Azure EC16es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEV5 family, designed for workloads requiring a high memory-to-CPU ratio. Built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor, it features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external storage volumes. It does not feature integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The high memory density of this server makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy operations that do not scale linearly with compute requirements. It is suited for relational databases, enterprise applications, and in-memory caching workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC16es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and premium storage compatibility for demanding enterprise database workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
